The Tray.io Platform API (also known as the Connectivity API) provides direct programmatic REST access to Tray's connectors, authentication management, trigger subscriptions, user and workspace administration, and project/solution lifecycle operations. Enables developers to integrate Tray's 700+ pre-built service connectors into their own applications without using the Builder UI. All endpoints require Bearer token authentication.
